svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" version="29.5.2"> <diagram name="S3 Static Website Hosting" id="s3-static-website"> <mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="700" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <!-- AWS Cloud Container --> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" value="AWS Cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="60" width="1040" height="540" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Region Container --> <mxCell id="region" value="Region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="aws-cloud"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="960" height="460" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- User/Browser --> <mxCell id="user" value="User / Browser" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.user;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="30" y="290" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- CloudFront Distribution --> <mxCell id="cloudfront" value="CloudFront Distribution
HTTP/2+3, IPv6, HTTPS" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#8C4FFF;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudfront;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="160" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Origin Access Control --> <mxCell id="oac" value="Origin Access Control
(SigV4 signed)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.identity_and_access_management;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="360" y="160" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- S3 Content Bucket --> <mxCell id="s3-content" value="S3 Content Bucket
Encrypted (AES256)
Versioned, No Public Access" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="600" y="160" width="60" height="62" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- S3 Log Bucket --> <mxCell id="s3-logs" value="S3 Log Bucket
Access Logs
90-day lifecycle" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="820" y="160" width="60" height="62" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Connections --> <!-- User to CloudFront --> <mxCell id="edge-user-cf" value="HTTPS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" target="cloudfront"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- CloudFront to OAC --> <mxCell id="edge-cf-oac" value="OAC Auth (SigV4)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="cloudfront" target="oac"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- OAC to S3 Content --> <mxCell id="edge-oac-s3" value="GetObject" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="oac" target="s3-content"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- S3 Content to S3 Logs --> <mxCell id="edge-s3-logs" value="Access Logs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="region" source="s3-content" target="s3-logs"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Architecture Notes --> <mxCell id="note-security" value="Security Highlights:
- Origin Access Control (OAC)
- SigV4 signed requests
- No public S3 access
- HTTPS-only (TLS 1.2+)
- redirect-to-https enforced" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF4E6;strokeColor=#D79B00;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="320" width="260" height="110" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note-performance" value="Performance:
- HTTP/2 and HTTP/3
- IPv6 enabled
- CachingOptimized policy
- Gzip/Brotli compression
- Custom error pages (SPA)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="420" y="320" width="260" height="110" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram></mxfile>
svg.text: S3 & CloudFront 静的ウェブサイトホスティング
